answerReadAs.C: Capital M, lowercase h, lowercase z.
answerReadAs.D: Capital M, capital H, lowercase z.

answerReadAs.A: Capital K, capital H, capital Z.
answerReadAs.B: Lowercase k, lowercase h, lowercase z.
answerReadAs.C: Lowercase k, lowercase h, capital Z.
answerReadAs.D: Lowercase k, capital H, lowercase z.

T8B08.questionReadAs: What is meant by the statement that a satellite is operating in U slash V mode?
